name: Waimanalo Country Farms
tagline: Seasonal pumpkin patch, corn maze, and farm activities on a real Waimanalo farm — fall is the best time.
parking: Free parking in the farm field lot
hours: Seasonal — typically open Oct–Nov for pumpkin season, check website/social media for dates
bestTime: Weekday mornings during pumpkin season for shortest lines; arrive at opening on weekends
talkStory: Best for ages 2-10. The fall pumpkin festival is the main draw — corn maze, hayrides, petting zoo, pumpkin picking, and local food vendors. It's a beloved Oahu fall tradition for local families. Lines get long on weekends so go early or on weekdays. Bring cash for food vendors. Wear closed-toe shoes — it's a working farm and gets muddy. They also do a smaller spring festival some years. Follow their Instagram for dates and hours.
